result_vocabulary.Valid: Blaster or Lean establishes the universally quantified statement within the declared scope.
result_vocabulary.Falsified: Blaster produces a counterexample to an intentionally unsafe universal statement; ledger-validity and replay remain required.
result_vocabulary.Pass: A deterministic artifact or cross-language gate succeeds.
result_vocabulary.Pending: No completion claim; implementation or evidence is absent.
result_vocabulary.Undetermined: The solver did not classify the statement; this cannot satisfy the catalog.

common_scope.ledger_precondition: CardanoLedgerApi.V3.validScriptContext ctx, except entries explicitly labeled raw-data robustness
common_scope.artifact_invocation_precondition: Top-level context theorems additionally require validContextForArtifact: the spending own-input payment credential, rewarding credential, or minting currency symbol equals the exact validator or policy identity under proof.
common_scope.artifact_rule: Top-level theorems target exact exporter-produced single_cbor_hex artifacts; helper theorems target reusable compiled closed terms.
common_scope.fuel_rule: Successful and logical-failure results must be distinguished from CEK exhaustion; completeness requires an explicit within-fuel precondition.
common_scope.list_rule: Unbounded recursive-list claims require Lean induction plus SMT subgoals; finite unrolling is not universal evidence.
common_scope.specification_rule: Semantic predicates are stated in typed ledger/business terms and may not duplicate raw field walks merely to make a theorem tautological.

entries.target: deployed Preprod artifacts and the coherent current-source candidate pair
